messages.content:
我想申请Master of Architecture at Carleton University, which requires me to upload my SlideRoom receipt to my application account. But when I try to upload my portfolio into SlideRoom, the SlideRoom requires me to enter my Applicant Number which is a 9 digit number and starts with either 100, 101 or 102. But my Applicant Ref. No. is only 7 digit number and starts with 172 (如下方截图所示). 这种情况下，请问我是否可以enter the 7 digit Applicant Ref. number 1723476 以完成 the portfolio upload?

请帮我就以上情况给architecturegrad@carleton.ca用英文写一封邮件进行咨询

Subject: Inquiry Regarding SlideRoom Upload Requirement for Master of Architecture Application

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to seek clarification regarding the SlideRoom upload requirement for the Master of Architecture program at Carleton University.

I have recently begun my application and encountered an issue while attempting to upload my portfolio to SlideRoom. The system prompted me to enter my Applicant Number, which is a 9-digit number beginning with either 100, 101, or 102. However, I have noticed that my Applicant Ref. No. is only a 7-digit number, with the prefix 172 (as shown in the screenshot below). 

Given this situation, I would like to inquire if it would be acceptable for me to enter my 7-digit Applicant Ref. number (e.g., 1723476) to successfully complete the portfolio upload in SlideRoom.

I apologize for any inconvenience caused by this inquiry, but I wanted to ensure that I provide the correct information and complete my application accurately. I truly appreciate your assistance in clarifying this matter.

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to your prompt response.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Applicant Ref. No.: 1723476]
[Your Contact Information]

Please translate and refine the following content:

2019年12月14日，我在中国建设银行存了100万元存期三年的定期存款（账号：1107076005200146710）。2022年12月14日该笔存款到期后，我把这笔定期存款通过我在中国建设银行银行的活期账户转到中国银行并把它存为一笔存期三年你的定期存款（账号：00000333763113845/00104）并于2023年11月30日把它冻结为担保金3.

On December 14, 2019, I deposited 1 million yuan in a 3-year fixed deposit with China Construction Bank (Account: 1107076005200146710). After the deposit matures on December 14, 2022, I transferred the funds from my current account at China Construction Bank to Bank of China and converted it into a 3-year fixed deposit (Account: 00000333763113845/00104). On November 30, 2023, I froze it as a guarantee deposit of 3.

Start Date: December 14, 2019
Maturity Date: December 14, 2022

请翻译以下内容：
定期存款账户明细查询
Fixed Deposit Account Statement Inquiry

请翻译以下内容：
定期存款账户明细查询
借方、贷方

Fixed Deposit Account Statement Inquiry
Debits, Credits

请翻译以下内容：
涞水县国土资源局
Land and Resources Bureau of Laishui County

请翻译以下内容：
北京市海淀区市场监督管理局
Beijing Haidian District Market Supervision Administration

请翻译以下内容：
股东会议决议
Shareholders' Meeting Resolution

请翻译以下内容：

同意注册资本变更为500万元，变更后出资情况为：
股东张健羽出资100万元， 股东张正云出资400万元

Agreed to change the registered capital to 5 million yuan. The revised capital contribution is as follows:
Shareholder Zhang Jianyu contributes 1 million yuan, and shareholder Zhang Zhengyun contributes 4 million yuan.

请翻译以下内容：
中国银行和广发银行账户交易流水上的存款记录可以侧面证明父亲张正云的高收入。
The deposit records on the transaction flow statements of Bank of China and Guangfa Bank can provide indirect evidence of the high income of my father, Zhang Zhengyun.
